heading: Program evaluation
label: 1769i Program evaluation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds made available under paragraph (3), the Secretary, acting through the Administrator of the Food and Nutrition Service, may conduct annual national performance assessments of the meal programs under this chapter and the Child Nutrition Act of 1966 ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 1771

children.label: A
children.text: the cost of producing meals and meal supplements under the programs described in paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: the nutrient profile of meals, and status of menu planning practices, under the programs.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 3 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection $5,000,000 for fiscal year 2004 and each subsequent fiscal year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds made available under paragraph (5), the Secretary, acting through the Administrator of the Food and Nutrition Service, shall conduct a study of the feasibility of improving the certification process used for the school lunch program established under this chapter.

children.heading: Pilot projects
children.label: 2 Pilot projects
children.text: In carrying out this subsection, the Secretary may conduct pilot projects to improve the certification process used for the school lunch program.

children.label: B
children.text: an integrated benefit eligibility determination process managed by a single agency;

children.label: C
children.text: income or program participation data gathered by State or local agencies; and

children.label: D
children.text: other options determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the Secretary may waive such provisions of this chapter and the Child Nutrition Act of 1966 ( et seq.) as are necessary to carry out this subsection.42 U.S.C. 1771

children.heading: Provisions
children.label: B Provisions
children.text: The protections of shall apply to any study or pilot project carried out under this subsection.section 1758(b)(6) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 5 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection such sums as are necessary.

children.heading: Cooperation with program research and evaluation
children.label: c Cooperation with program research and evaluation
children.text: States, State educational agencies, local educational agencies, schools, institutions, facilities, and contractors participating in programs authorized under this chapter and the Child Nutrition Act of 1966 ( et seq.) shall cooperate with officials and contractors acting on behalf of the Secretary, in the conduct of evaluations and studies under those Acts.42 U.S.C. 1771
